name: infer_diff_pairs
short_description: Infer differential pairs, typically for ports just imported from a CSV or XDC file
full_help:
infer_diff_pairs

Description: 
Infer differential pairs, typically for ports just imported from a CSV or XDC file

Syntax: 
infer_diff_pairs  [-file_type <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<file>...]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-file_type]  Input file type: 'csv' or 'xdc'
                Default: file type
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<file>]      Pin Planning CSV or XDC file
                Default: file

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Input file type: 'csv' or 'xdc' Default: file type
Suspend message limits during command execution
